channel.title: Start Ups on Ivan Fraixedes' Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Start Ups on Ivan Fraixedes' Blog

item.title: My 5 favourite tweets of the week #8
item.description:
Another short week is almost done and here my 5 favourite tweets of the last 7 days which appeared in my timeline.

The moment arrived, after several years under development, Rust beta has been released and the first stable release has been scheduled for 15th of May, so AWESOME

Rust 1.0-beta is here!! http://t.co/8HTh1jrL69

— Rust Language (@rustlang) April 3, 2015

Very nice web resource to see what ES6 brings and how these new features differ from its predecessor ES5

nice hands-on resource for learning ES6: http://t.co/VB5WcTT4LR

— Ilya Grigorik (@igrigorik) April 4, 2015

I’ve go quite old great blog post about Open Source and how delaying to make it open affects, at least when it’s created by a governmental organisation

another great post by @kfogel: Be Open [Source] From Day One http://t.co/8hTihlTZNo

— Aidan Feldman (@aidanfeldman) April 8, 2015

A friend of mine tweeted about [Ghost](https://ghost.org/) blog post where they’ve made public all their revenues metrics, I’m very thrilled how some companies, as Buffer 1 2, and Baremetrics 1 2 3, are moving toward the transparency

$411,000 in ARR and @TryGhost just made all of their revenue metrics completely public: http://t.co/SGH5CFmeQE

— BROLΛПDO (@orliesaurus) April 9, 2015

Javascript is moving to take over the stablished Java and .NET enterprise stacks, we’ll see what will happen

JavaScript will lead a massive shift in enterprise development http://t.co/07XVzu9LgK

— Paul Krill (@pjkrill) April 9, 2015

Have a great weekend!
